Celandine City! The first Gym should be: Celandine City! The first Gym should be here somewhere.

GUY: My friend hasn't shown up yet... I: GUY: My friend hasn't shown up yet... I was going to ask her out on a date.

SABER: I don't need to be here.

\"Revolutionizing recycling and making I: "Revolutionizing recycling and making Ivere a cleaner place!"
Inspectin' the cargo that arrives here i: Inspectin' the cargo that arrives here is such an exhaustive job.
But nothin' will escape my watchful eye!: But nothin' will escape my watchful eye!
No suspicious packages or crates filled: No suspicious packages or crates filled with funny stuff will be smuggled into Ivere, no sirree!
Celandine's directly adjacent to the sea: Celandine's directly adjacent to the sea, but it's kept extremely clean thanks to Celandine Waste Inc.'s incredible waste processor.
Not only is it capable of recycling almo: Not only is it capable of recycling almost any trash thrown in the garbage dump, state-of-the-art air filtering technology makes it not stink up the city!
If more regions and cities installed thi: If more regions and cities installed this kind of technology, I think it'd be a lot kinder to our world and the environment.
I'll never get tired of the view of the: I'll never get tired of the view of the ocean, even after having been on this planet for so long.
Celandine Waste Inc. is responsible for: Celandine Waste Inc. is responsible for the underground garbage dump. They do weekly cleanups of the city, too.
We can chalk it up to them that the city: We can chalk it up to them that the city stays this clean.
Please be careful when venturing into th: Please be careful when venturing into the garbage dump.

Five minutes from now, I'm going to walk: Five minutes from now, I'm going to walk across this pedestrian crossing!
I-I'm not stalling for time or anything!: I-I'm not stalling for time or anything!
I'm on patrol duty. This is routine for: I'm on patrol duty. This is routine for this time of the year, but we're on high alert right now.

Hey! You! Don't be doing anything suspic: Hey! You! Don't be doing anything suspicious, you hear me?! I'm watching you!!
There's been reports of some new trainer: There's been reports of some new trainers' Pokémon getting stolen and I'm not about to stand around and watch it happen!!!
I was supposed to have my days off today: I was supposed to have my days off today and tomorrow, so I could just chill during the festival.
But now there's these reports about peop: But now there's these reports about people's Pokémon getting stolen, so they have everyone on duty to make sure nothing goes awry.

Hello citizen! There is nothing to worry: Hello citizen! There is nothing to worry about! Everything is COMPLETELY UNDER CONTROL.

Hmm? Please leave me to my devices.
I'm merely admiring these crates filled: I'm merely admiring these crates filled with the unknown, that is all.
Hey, newbie! Welcome to Celandine City!: Hey, newbie! Welcome to Celandine City!
Just between you and me, but I'd be a li: Just between you and me, but I'd be a little careful where you go right now.

I've already had my money stolen from me: I've already had my money stolen from me, so I'm trusting absolutely no one.
The League kickoff festival is supposed: The League kickoff festival is supposed to be a happy time, but all this talk about thieves going around is really killing the vibe.

There are people working on finding the: There are people working on finding the source of the issue, so hang in there!

Nothing escapes me and my team of Patrat: Nothing escapes me and my team of Patrat's watchful eyes! Get ready!

SABER: And so, our adventures in Celandi: SABER: And so, our adventures in Celandine City came to an end.
Even though Team Splicer managed to esca: Even though Team Splicer managed to escape, they've conceded defeat and have left the area.
Trainers have finally been reunited with: Trainers have finally been reunited with their stolen Pokémon, and the League Challenge can continue unhindered now.

She briefly looked like she was about to: She briefly looked like she was about to faint when we told her Adelinde was involved in the Splicer base raid.

Adelinde insisted on that I keep the Pok: Adelinde insisted on that I keep the Pokémon she gave me as well!
She said she wanted to catch her own tea: She said she wanted to catch her own team instead, and wants to stand more on her own two feet.
She then followed it up with her desire: She then followed it up with her desire to start traveling more on her own...
Only for her mother to immediately start: Only for her mother to immediately start freaking out again.
I think it's gonna take a while until Ad: I think it's gonna take a while until Adelinde can convince her, hahaha...
SABER: Afterwards, Lucile insisted on gr: SABER: Afterwards, Lucile insisted on granting us special honors for the great amount of help we've given.

Oh, and I mentioned most of us initially: Oh, and I mentioned most of us initially didn't care for the ceremony, right?
Perhaps predictable, but there was one p: Perhaps predictable, but there was one person who eagerly agreed to it--\| Enya.

Also, she <i>finally</i> got her gym bad: Also, she finally got her gym badge.

Something, something,\\| \"THIS IS JUST: Something, something,\| "THIS IS JUST THE START OF ME BECOMING BETTER THAN YOU, BOZO."
SABER: As for me...\\| I'm not sure what: SABER: As for me...\| I'm not sure what the future holds.
I'll keep challenging the League and get: I'll keep challenging the League and get stronger, but I've yet to find a clue to what those visions of mine were.
Perhaps on my journey I'll find the answ: Perhaps on my journey I'll find the answers I seek.

All I can do is face the unknown with my: All I can do is face the unknown with my head held high!

I've got a best friend that's traveling: I've got a best friend that's traveling at the same time as me...
A new friend who is looking to grow out: A new friend who is looking to grow out of her shell...
